sense.definition: a toy or device designed to create loud or distinctive sounds when activated, often used for celebration, entertainment, or signaling purposes during events and parties

examples.x: The children grabbed their noisemakers and ran outside to join the parade.
Everyone blew their noisemakers when the clock struck midnight on New Year’s Eve.
The noisemaker made such a loud sound that it startled the dog.
She handed out noisemakers to all the guests at the party before the countdown began.

sense.definition: a small-scale replica or simplified version of a real musical instrument, often made of plastic or other child-safe materials, designed for play and introduction to music and sound exploration for childre

examples.x: The kids enjoyed playing together with their toy instruments at the park.
At the daycare, the children gathered around the toy instruments, making their own little band.
She got a toy instrument set for Christmas and spent the whole day trying each one.
The toddler loved banging on the toy instrument, creating her own little tunes.

sense.definition: a small handheld toy that produces a "moo" sound when tipped or turned over, imitating the sound of a cow, providing amusement and fun for children

examples.x: The kids were laughing as they pressed the moo box to hear the sound.
I gave my niece a moo box for her birthday, and she loved it.
Every time we press the moo box, it makes a funny moo sound.
We used the moo box to teach the children about farm animals during storytime.

sense.definition: a small toy that makes a squeaking sound when squeezed or pressed, often used for play and entertainment for pets and children alike

examples.x: The dog loves playing with her squeaky toy, especially when I throw it across the yard.
I stepped on a squeaky toy by accident, and it made such a loud noise that everyone looked at me.
The baby giggled every time she squeezed the squeaky toy in her hand.
He gave his dog a squeaky toy to keep her entertained while he cleaned the house.
She bought a new squeaky toy for her puppy to help him with teething.

sense.definition: a handheld toy for infants, typically consisting of a handle with a hollow ball or container containing small objects, such as beads, that create rattling sounds when shaken, designed to engage and stimulate babies' senses

examples.x: The sound of the baby rattle caught the puppy’s attention.
The soft sound of the baby rattle calmed him down after his nap.
I bought a new baby rattle as a gift for the newborn.
I packed a baby rattle in the diaper bag for the trip to the park.
She loves to grab her baby rattle and make it shake.

sense.definition: a small, handheld device used to produce a high-pitched sound when blown into, often used for communication, signaling, or as a toy for play and fun

examples.x: The referee blew the whistle to stop the game after a foul was committed.
She carried a whistle with her while hiking in case of emergencies.
The lifeguard used a whistle to alert swimmers of the approaching storm.
He always keeps a whistle handy when jogging in the park for safety reasons.

sense.definition: a musical toy made of a corrugated tube with beads or small objects inside, producing unique whirring and vibrating sounds when spun or shaken, providing a mesmerizing auditory and visual experience

examples.x: The kids were having a blast running around the yard with their whirly tubes, making all sorts of fun sounds.
I picked up a whirly tube at the toy store, and my little brother couldn't stop playing with it.
He showed me how to use the whirly tube, and soon we were both laughing at the noise it made.
The whirly tube was a great addition to our picnic, as it entertained the children for hours.

sense.definition: a small, noise-making device used in celebrations and parties, producing a loud noise when blown into, adding to the festive atmosphere and fun

examples.x: The children blew on their party horns as the birthday cake was brought out.
She handed out party hats and party horns to everyone at the celebration.
When the clock struck midnight, we all blew our party horns to celebrate the new year.
As soon as the birthday song finished, everyone grabbed their party horns and blew them loudly.

sense.definition: a mechanical toy that resembles a monkey, featuring cymbals that it clangs together when wound up, creating an amusing and entertaining display, commonly used as a novelty and collectible item

examples.x: I found an old jolly chimp in my attic and wound it up for fun.
The jolly chimp clanged its cymbals together, making everyone laugh.
At the party, the kids enjoyed watching the jolly chimp play its cymbals.
My younger brother loves his jolly chimp toy, and he plays with it every day.

sense.definition: a traditional Japanese toy made from bamboo and paper, shaped like a clapper, and when swung back and forth, it creates a clacking sound, often used by children during summer festivals or as a noisemaker

examples.x: The children played with the den den daiko during the festival, making the drum spin with each turn of the handle.
I bought a den den daiko as a souvenir from Japan; it’s a fun toy to play with when I’m feeling bored.
During the parade, many people carried den den daiko to create rhythmic sounds as they marched.
My little brother loves playing with his den den daiko during the summer festivals.
The sound of the den den daiko echoed through the street as the children spun the handles.

sense.definition: a traditional Jewish noisemaker used during Purim celebrations to make noise and drown out the name of the villainous character Haman

examples.x: The children eagerly grabbed their gragers to shake during the Purim celebration.
Every time Haman's name was mentioned, the room filled with the loud noise of gragers.
The grager was a favorite toy among the kids at the Purim party, and they kept playing with it all night.

sense.definition: a novelty toy consisting of a long, flexible tube with a small horn on one end, and when the tube is compressed or stretched, it produces a comical groaning or moaning sound, providing amusement and entertainment

examples.x: The children laughed when they played with the groan tube, making funny sounds during the party.
I picked up a groan tube at the toy store for the kids' birthday, knowing they would love the noise it made.
I found the groan tube in the toy chest and decided to show it to my friends at the gathering.
The groan tube added an extra layer of fun to the sound effects at the Halloween party.
My younger brother spent hours with his groan tube, fascinated by how it made such a funny noise.

sense.definition: a classic toy that features a surprise element, with a figure, often a clown or puppet, hidden inside a box, and when the crank is turned, the figure pops up with a "jack-in-the-box" sound, providing delight and surprise for children

examples.x: The children laughed in surprise when the jack-in-the-box popped open.
I found an old jack-in-the-box at the flea market and decided to buy it.
My little sister loves playing with her colorful jack-in-the-box.
He gave the jack-in-the-box a twist and waited for the surprise to happen.
For his birthday, I gave him a classic jack-in-the-box as a nostalgic gift.

sense.definition: a musical toy that resembles drumsticks and features built-in electronic sensors that produce drum sounds when tapped on different surfaces
